name: CM_DIALOG_SCROLL_DESC
description: Screen with title bar, scrollable description area, and 1-2 action buttons at bottom. Description area supports vertical scrolling with up/down arrow keys. Gradient masks at top and bottom indicate scrollable content. Buttons use same styling as Core_CM_Confirmation.
visualForm: Three sections: title bar with back arrow (50px), scrollable content area (128px) with gradient masks, button row at bottom (62px height)
descriptionKo: 타이틀 바, 스크롤 가능한 설명 영역, 하단 1~2개 액션 버튼으로 구성된 화면입니다. 상하 방향키로 설명을 스크롤하며, 상하 그라디언트 마스크로 스크롤 가능 여부를 시각적으로 안내합니다.
descriptionEn: Screen with title bar, scrollable description area, and 1-2 action buttons at bottom. Description area supports vertical scrolling with up/down arrow keys. Gradient masks at top and bottom indicate scrollable content. Buttons use same styling as Core_CM_Confirmation.
